meaning: adj.患精神病的,精神病患者的,极愚蠢的
examples: The letter made her insane with jealousy.
The boy is half insane with hysteria and self-indulgence.
Ms. LEMS: (Singing) You want to pay to take a peek at what drives men insane?
Along the way, they deal with snide Vulcans, dangerous alien ecosystems, and insane Starfleet Commodores.
